rows.name: Support breakdown
rows.note: Support has given way — no fresh long here. Only aggressive traders short a weak pullback, with a stop above the broken level.

rows.name: Resistance breakout
rows.note: Fresh breakout confirmed on 2.5× average volume. A long can be considered on a close above the breakout level, with a stop just below the base and risk kept to ~1–2% of capital.

rows.name: Resistance breakout
rows.note: Fresh breakout confirmed on 3.3× average volume. A long can be considered on a close above the breakout level, with a stop just below the base and risk kept to ~1–2% of capital.

rows.name: Range breakout (up)
rows.note: Fresh breakout confirmed on 2.5× average volume. A long can be considered on a close above the breakout level, with a stop just below the base and risk kept to ~1–2% of capital.

rows.name: Resistance breakout
rows.note: Breakout not yet backed by a clear volume surge — treat as tentative and wait for confirmation.

rows.name: Resistance breakout
rows.note: Breakout underway but volume is only moderate — wait for a decisive close above the level before committing.
